projectDescription: AlgoSeek is an institutional-grade financial market data platform providing ultra-low-latency tick, bar, and reference data for US equities, options, futures, and future options — delivered via cloud, API, co-location, and the ArdaDB columnar database.
keyFeatures: 200+ datasets covering US equities, options, futures, and future options
Tick-level data with nanosecond timestamps from SIP consolidated feed
Minute bar, second bar, and daily OHLC aggregations with 60+ analytics fields
ArdaDB columnar cloud database with 2+ petabytes of ready-to-query data
Ultra-low-latency co-location feed (<15µs) from Equinix NY2/NY4 data centers
Corporate-action-adjusted historical data going back to 2007
Flexible delivery: CSV, SQL, API, cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure/Snowflake/Databricks), SFTP
Custom data engineering, pipeline-as-a-service, and ticker plant offerings
Reference data: Security Master, ASID Lookup, Adjustment Factors, IPO files
publicApiSurface: RESTful API for real-time and historical data access
WebSocket streaming output from Ticker Plant
SFTP file delivery (CSV, Parquet, JSON, HDF5, FIX, Feather, Excel)
AWS / Google Cloud / Snowflake / Databricks / Azure direct integration
Dataset identifiers: algoseek SecID, FIGI, ISIN, ASID ticker mapping
